answers.answer: B) The system must handle image resizing, storage limits, and content moderation. These are critical implicit requirements for security, storage, and compliance. Option A too specific, C is nice-to-have, D is UI preference.

IMPLICIT REQUIREMENTS: SECURITY: CSRF, XSS prevention, rate limiting, CAPTCHA, email validation. VALIDATION: Name/email/message required with length limits. BACKEND: Email delivery, templates, storage, error handling, retry logic. COMPLIANCE: Privacy policy, consent, data retention. UX: Success/error messages, validation feedback, loading state, mobile, accessibility. OPERATIONAL: Submission destination, notifications, spam filtering, auto-reply. TIMELINE: End of day unrealistic - MVP 4-8h, production 1-2 days.
